meaning: n.赞美,称赞,颂歌vt.赞美,称赞
examples: So under Archbishop Laud, only the official liturgy could be recited in church.
I will laud mine enemies and they will become friends; I will encourage my friends and they will become brothers.
For generations to come some will laud him as a saviour of the Serbs.
Even members of Mori's own party have been hard-pressed to laud their new leader.
